#### Reference issue
<!--Example: Closes gh-WXYZ.-->
Solves #20821
#### What does this implement/fix?
<!--Please explain your changes.-->
I modified the parameters used in the _parameterization function of the levy_stable_gen class. Previously, this function did not read the passed parameters because it used class attributes. By changing it to use instance attributes, this bug can be resolved.
#### Additional information
<!--Any additional information you think is important.-->
This is an example:
```
import numpy as np
from scipy.stats import levy_stable

stable_distribution = levy_stable(alpha=1.9, beta=0.1, loc=0.0, scale=1.0)

levy_stable.parameterization = "S0"
samples_s0 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

levy_stable.parameterization = "S1"
samples_s1 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

assert not np.all(np.isclose(samples_s0, samples_s1))

Describe your issue.

When trying to sample from stats.levy_stable.rvs() with levy_stable.parametrization="S0", the returned samples are not transformed, but in the "S1"-parameterization. Line 850 of stats._levy_stable.__init__ does not get executed.
This is likely due to automatically resolving to the frozen distribution in stats._distn_infrastructure:rv_frozen.rvs() [line 493]. 


### Reproducing Code Example

```python
import numpy as np
from scipy.stats import levy_stable

stable_distribution = levy_stable(alpha=1.9, beta=0.1, loc=0.0, scale=1.0)
stable_distribution.parameterization = "S0" #  we could also set this directly as levy_stable.parameterization, makes no difference
samples_s0 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

stable_distribution.parameterization = "S1"
samples_s1 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

# due to the needed transformation between "S0" and "S1" parameterizations, the samples should definitely not be identical, but they are
assert not np.all(np.isclose(samples_s0, samples_s1)) # this should hold!
```


### Error message

```shell
No error message
```

Describe your issue.

When trying to sample from stats.levy_stable.rvs() with levy_stable.parametrization="S0", the returned samples are not transformed, but in the "S1"-parameterization. Line 850 of stats._levy_stable.__init__ does not get executed.
This is likely due to automatically resolving to the frozen distribution in stats._distn_infrastructure:rv_frozen.rvs() [line 493]. 


### Reproducing Code Example

```python
import numpy as np
from scipy.stats import levy_stable

stable_distribution = levy_stable(alpha=1.9, beta=0.1, loc=0.0, scale=1.0)
stable_distribution.parameterization = "S0" #  we could also set this directly as levy_stable.parameterization, makes no difference
samples_s0 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

stable_distribution.parameterization = "S1"
samples_s1 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

# due to the needed transformation between "S0" and "S1" parameterizations, the samples should definitely not be identical, but they are
assert not np.all(np.isclose(samples_s0, samples_s1)) # this should hold!
```

```shell
No error message
```

#### What does this implement/fix?
<!--Please explain your changes.-->

samples_s0 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

levy_stable.parameterization = "S1"
samples_s1 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

assert not np.all(np.isclose(samples_s0, samples_s1))
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/21332/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/21332/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/comments/2274860351","html_url":"https://github.com/scipy/scipy/pull/21332#issuecomment-2274860351","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/21332","id":2274860351,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABZIoc6Hl50_","user":{"login":"Linfye","id":91316150,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjkxMzE2MTUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/91316150?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye","html_url":"https://github.com/Linfye","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-08-08T03:00:09Z","updated_at":"2024-08-08T03:00:09Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"@lucascolley I add a test in `test_distributions.py`. #### Reference issue
<!--Example: Closes gh-WXYZ.-->
Solves #20821
#### What does this implement/fix?
<!--Please explain your changes.-->
I modified the parameters used in the _parameterization function of the levy_stable_gen class. Previously, this function did not read the passed parameters because it used class attributes. By changing it to use instance attributes, this bug can be resolved.
#### Additional information
<!--Any additional information you think is important.-->
This is an example:
```
import numpy as np
from scipy.stats import levy_stable

stable_distribution = levy_stable(alpha=1.9, beta=0.1, loc=0.0, scale=1.0)

levy_stable.parameterization = "S0"
samples_s0 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

levy_stable.parameterization = "S1"
samples_s1 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

assert not np.all(np.isclose(samples_s0, samples_s1))
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/21332/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/21332/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/comments/2277803434","html_url":"https://github.com/scipy/scipy/pull/21332#issuecomment-2277803434","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/21332","id":2277803434,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABZIoc6HxIWq","user":{"login":"Linfye","id":91316150,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjkxMzE2MTUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/91316150?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye","html_url":"https://github.com/Linfye","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-08-09T12:09:44Z","updated_at":"2024-08-09T12:09:44Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"@ev-br is there anything else I need to do about this PR?

Solves #20821
#### What does this implement/fix?
<!--Please explain your changes.-->
I modified the parameters used in the _parameterization function of the levy_stable_gen class. Previously, this function did not read the passed parameters because it used class attributes. By changing it to use instance attributes, this bug can be resolved.
#### Additional information
<!--Any additional information you think is important.-->
This is an example:
```
import numpy as np
from scipy.stats import levy_stable

stable_distribution = levy_stable(alpha=1.9, beta=0.1, loc=0.0, scale=1.0)

levy_stable.parameterization = "S0"
samples_s0 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

levy_stable.parameterization = "S1"
samples_s1 = stable_distribution.rvs(size=(1000,1), random_state=49)

assert not np.all(np.isclose(samples_s0, samples_s1))
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/21332/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/21332/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/comments/2306365855","html_url":"https://github.com/scipy/scipy/pull/21332#issuecomment-2306365855","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scipy/scipy/issues/21332","id":2306365855,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABZIoc6JeFmf","user":{"login":"Linfye","id":91316150,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjkxMzE2MTUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/91316150?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye","html_url":"https://github.com/Linfye","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Linfye/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-08-23T06:14:16Z","updated_at":"2024-08-23T06:14:16Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"The current scipy doc shows [this](https://docs.scipy.org/doc/scipy/reference/generated/scipy.stats.levy_stable.html#scipy.stats.levy_stable).
